summary: Tested Kernel rename + mocked client-side auth (Login/Register). Verified 57/57 scenarios: unauth redirect to /login, login+register pages contents/testids/validation, successful login persists to localStorage 'kernel-user' as {email,name(email-prefix)}, FORGOT alert, Create Account/Login cross-nav, authed /login & /register redirect to /, header hidden on auth pages, header-user display, logout clears storage and redirects, theme persists across logout onto auth page, kernel-theme (not vibecon-theme) used, page title 'Kernel — Human MCP Workspace'. Regression: jobs listing (5 cards), JOB-001 default→accepted→submitted→approved with +500 pts reward, tunnel URL https://tunnel.kernel.io/JOB-001, preview URL https://preview.kernel.io/JOB-001, @kernel/human-mcp@latest, KERNEL_TOKEN env, chat typing indicator (3 dots) + ~1.8s auto-reply, 1-column grid at ≤768px, no VibeCon leaks. 0 console errors.
passed_tests: Unauth visiting / redirects to /login
Login page: data-testid='login-page', KERNEL brand, heading 'Access the Work-OS.', correct subtitle
Login has email/password inputs, LOGIN submit, Create Account link, FORGOT button, gradient + decor
Header NOT rendered on /login or /register
Login validation: empty submit -> 'Please enter your email and password.'
Login validation: malformed email -> 'Please enter a valid email address.'
Login FORGOT? shows demo-only alert
Login 'Create Account' link navigates to /register
Register page: data-testid='register-page', KERNEL brand, heading 'Create your account.', correct subtitle
Register has 4 fields (name/email/password/confirm), CREATE ACCOUNT submit, Login link
Register empty submit -> 'Please fill in name, email and password.'
Register invalid email -> 'Please enter a valid email address.'
Register password <6 -> 'Password must be at least 6 characters.'
Register password mismatch -> 'Passwords do not match.'
Register 'Login' link navigates to /login
Login with any non-empty password + valid email navigates to / and persists {email,name=email-prefix} to kernel-user
Header shows Kernel logo+dot, Expert/Jobs nav, header-user (display name), theme-toggle, logout-btn
Authed user visiting /login and /register redirects to /
Logout clears localStorage 'kernel-user' and redirects to /login
Jobs listing shows 5 cards
JOB-001 default -> accepted -> submitted -> approved flow; reward +500 pts in reward-inset
Tunnel URL = https://tunnel.kernel.io/JOB-001, Preview URL = https://preview.kernel.io/JOB-001
MCP config uses @kernel/human-mcp@latest and env KERNEL_TOKEN
No 'VibeCon' string leaks anywhere
Chat send -> typing indicator with 3 .chat-typing-dot appears, auto-reply appended after ~1.8s
Page title = 'Kernel — Human MCP Workspace'
localStorage uses 'kernel-theme'; 'vibecon-theme' absent
Theme toggle on /jobs persists to /login after logout (dark retained)
Responsive: jobs-grid collapses to single column at 768px
